npm.name: @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk
npm.why: Claude Agent SDK adapter used by src/runtime/claude-agent-runtime.js

npm.name: @larksuiteoapi/node-sdk
npm.why: Feishu/Lark REST APIs, message-resource downloads, and Long Connection WebSocket receiver

npm.name: @openai/codex-sdk
npm.why: Codex SDK adapter used by src/runtime/codex-sdk-runtime.js

npm.name: @openai/codex
npm.why: Codex CLI binary used by the Codex SDK runtime

npm.name: axios
npm.why: Transitive dependency of @larksuiteoapi/node-sdk; pinned by npm overrides for audit hygiene

cli.name: claude
cli.why: Claude Agent SDK spawns the Claude Code CLI for turns

cli.name: codex
cli.install: Installed by npm ci as node_modules/.bin/codex through @openai/codex-sdk
cli.why: Codex SDK starts/resumes Codex CLI-backed threads

externalServices.name: Feishu/Lark Open Platform REST
externalServices.why: Validate app credentials and call IM message/resource, CardKit, and Contact APIs

requiredScopes: im:message (read messages, resolve thread IDs, download message image resources)

conditionalScopes.when: Optional cleanup of A2A's own empty/overflow/probe messages
